Chat - model stays persistent after refresh/load
Audio - moved control menu to the left side for consistency
Sidemenu - now fully dynamic and visually improved
App Kanban - improved looks and functionality
Aethvion Suite - panel transition animation and speed
Aethvion Suite - panel header standardization
Aethvion Suite - empty state, now showing options instead of nothing
Aethvion Suite - button animations
Aethvion Suite - scrollbar consistent across all pages
fixed: Chat - showing home on refresh/load
Explained - bleeding into chat fixed

added: Explained Information Explorer: A new visual workflow for generating deeply researched, thematic HTML explanations; features 'Deep Dive' mode, 'Open Folder' options, and auto-theme support
Aethvion Overlay v2: Major overhaul with persistent chat history, session continuation, markdown/code rendering, and screenshot integration
Dashboard Performance: Modularized all main panels into separate partials, dramatically increasing performance and improving code maintainability
Aethvion Kanban: Professional Kanban board integration with draggable columns and task persistence
Companion System: Added default companions, custom companion mode, and specific fixes for 'Axiom' and 'Lyra'
Chat Enhancements: Integrated web search capabilities and Chat Thread Folders for better organization
Model Management: Improved registry flow with 'Parent Categories' and reordering/filtering for local models
System Standardization: Moved timestamps to ISO 8601 and standardized internal workflows to 'Checks'
improved: Sidemenu: Added tooltips to the collapsed menu, UX improvements, and a search function
Agent Logic: Implemented 'smart context eviction' and decreased prompt token usage for better efficiency
Finance Hub: Updated layouts and added visual gain/loss cards
Media Tabs: Refined layouts for Games (added back buttons) and Image Models pages
Dashboard UI: Fixed various HTML issues, including stray divs and duplicate inputs
CLI & Docs: Updated the Command Line Interface and licensing clarifications
fixed: Bug Fixes: Resolved issues with JS loading, game page loading, 'magic strings', and overlay cut-off bugs
System Utilities: Removed unnecessary bloat from local model logic and smoothed out provider settings

added: Aethvion Kanban: Professional Kanban board with drag-and-drop columns, task persistence, and standalone execution support
AI Scheduler: Cron-based automated AI tasks — create recurring prompts with specific schedules (e.g. 'Every day at 9 AM'); tasks run in background and send notifications on completion
AI Scheduler: Task persistence — scheduled tasks saved to data/scheduled_tasks/ with full configuration, results, and state tracking
Notification Hub: Real-time system-wide alerts — persistent notification history accessible from the header bell icon
Notification Hub: Granular filtering — toggle visibility for different alert sources (Agents, Schedule, System, Nexus) in the Settings > Notifications tab
Notification Hub: Deep-linking navigation — clicking a notification automatically navigates to the relevant dashboard tab and selects the related item (e.g. specific task ID)
Persistent Memory: Integrated chat memory — chat sidebar now includes a 'Memory' section showing active context topics and long-term facts extracted from conversations
Persistent Memory: Fact extraction logic — Nexus Core now automatically updates the memory graph after significant conversation milestones
Chat UI: Compact thread history — redesigned sidebar with smaller thread cards, date dividers (Today, Yesterday, Last Week), and last-message previews
System Debloating: Legacy 'tools/' root directory removed — standard tools consolidated into core/tools/standard/ for a leaner project structure
System Debloating: Deprecated Tool Forge — system shifted entirely to Agentic Skill execution via Workspaces, reducing overhead from static tool generation
improved: Companion UI: Misaka Cipher reordered — moved to the 'Companions' category in the sidebar for better logical grouping
Companion UI: Chat thread history date dividers added for improved context tracking
Infrastructure: Startup speed optimizations — reduced initialization overhead by lazy-loading non-essential Nexus modules
Infrastructure: Environment setup — enhanced setup_environment.bat with better error reporting and automated venv repair
fixed: UI: CMD windows flashing fix — modified background command execution to use CREATE_NO_WINDOW flag, preventing distracting terminal popups during tool use
Chat: Thread history last message fix — corrected an edge case where the thread preview wouldn't update until after a page refresh
Notifications: Noise reduction — removed redundant 'Task Running' notifications; users now only receive 'Success' or 'Error' alerts for scheduled tasks

added: Agent Corp: get_project_blueprint action — generates a full hierarchical workspace tree in one call, replacing dozens of list_dir calls; cached for 120s in the corp data directory
Agent Corp: search_codebase action — regex/literal search returning matching lines with line numbers so workers find code without reading whole files
Agent Corp: read_shared_memory / update_shared_memory actions — corp-wide key-value knowledge store; workers share discoveries and avoid duplicate research
Agent Corp: Namespaced shared-memory keys — files:name for file locations, stack:name for tech-stack facts; done:* keys auto-written on task completion
Agent Corp: Post-task auto-snapshot — when a task completes the system automatically writes a done:{task_id} entry to shared memory so future workers see what was already done
Agent Corp: Structured shared-memory display — worker and planner prompts split shared memory into Completed Work (done:* keys) and Shared Team Knowledge sections
Agent Corp: Task detail modal — clicking a task card opens a read-only view with title, status badge, assignee, priority, description, and result summary
Agent Corp: Task card hover previews — 120-character description shown on hover via title attribute
Usage Analytics: Hero banner — large total spend with vs-previous-period delta indicator and 14-day mini sparkline
Usage Analytics: Activity heatmap — GitHub-style 52-week contribution grid coloured by daily spend intensity with month labels and hover tooltips
Usage Analytics: Daily spend bar chart — colour-gradient bars showing per-day cost over the selected range
Usage Analytics: Timeline segmented control — switch between Tokens / Cost / Calls view without reloading
Usage Analytics: Auto-generated insights row — top model share, peak day, avg cost per call, and input/output token split pills
Usage Analytics: CSV export — one-click download of the current filtered history as a .csv file
Usage Analytics: Live search filter on Recent API Calls table — filter by model, source, or provider
Usage Analytics: vs-previous-period delta on hero banner comparing current period to the preceding equal period
Usage Analytics: /api/usage/daily endpoint backed by get_daily_breakdown() for heatmap and bar chart data

Infrastructure: Registry-based model pricing — _estimate_cost in corp_manager.py reads input_cost_per_1m_tokens and output_cost_per_1m_tokens from data/config/model_registry.json via a module-level cache; supports all configured providers
License: Dual license (AGPLv3 + Commercial) replacing MIT; includes version history note, commercial trigger definitions, and CLA section
License: Asset license v1.1 — CC BY-NC-ND 4.0 with explicit Commercial Inclusion, Modification, Standalone Redistribution, and Trademark Use clauses
Infrastructure: C-level crash logging — enabled faulthandler in core/main.py to capture segmentation faults automatically to data/logs/system/crashlog.txt
Infrastructure: Unified environment setup — extracted common batch initialization logic cleanly into setup/setup_environment.bat
Aethvion LinkMap: Standalone 3D codebase visualizer app supporting Python, JavaScript, TypeScript, JSX, and TSX parsing
Aethvion LinkMap: Interactive 3D force-directed graph UI with persistent node labels via SpriteText and dynamic connection highlighting
Aethvion LinkMap: Responsive split-screen layout with an integrated inline code viewer highlighting function dependencies
Aethvion LinkMap: ProjectAnalyzer backend that caches parsed AST read-outs to data/apps/linkmap/ for fast, recurring workspace loads
improved: Agent Corp: Knowledge block MRU ordering — file digests shown most-recently-used first with a 1,500-char hard cap; sessions touching 30+ files stay lean
Agent Corp: File-write focused action log — Recent: always shows all write/patch/append actions so the model always sees what was changed
Agent Corp: Operator message caching — log re-read only when line count changes, eliminating a redundant file read on every LLM call
Agent Corp: Blueprint cache location — _blueprint.txt written to data/agent_corps/{id}/ instead of the user's project workspace
Agent Corp: Worker prompt token efficiency — CORP_SYSTEM_PROMPT ~60% smaller than base; iterations 1+ use 270-char _task_short saving ~6,700 chars per call
Agent Corp: t/s calculation — actual LLM streaming time (llm_elapsed_s) now used as denominator, excluding tool execution overhead
Usage Analytics: Model breakdown table — added Input Cost, Output Cost, and Avg/Call columns (6 → 9 columns)
Usage Analytics: Recent calls table increased from 25 to 100 rows
Usage Analytics: 3M preset added alongside 1D / 1W / 1M / All
Usage Analytics: Provider doughnut chart shows cost in tooltip alongside call count
Usage Analytics: Stat cards redesigned with accent colours, icons, and descriptive sub-labels
fixed: Agent Corp: Double message in company chat — removed optimistic local add; SSE echo is now the single source of truth
Agent Corp: Workers ignoring operator messages — _build_prompt now injects last 3 [Operator → …] lines on every iteration 1+
Agent Corp: Cost always defaulting to Sonnet pricing — replaced hardcoded substring table with model_registry.json lookup
Agent Corp: Tokens-per-second showing unrealistically low values — was using wall-clock time including tool execution; fixed by measuring only LLM streaming window
Infrastructure: Flake8 lint error F824 — Removed unused global _MODEL_PRICE_CACHE declaration in core/orchestrator/corp_manager.py

Infrastructure: False positive API key detection — Modified a comment in core/orchestrator/corp_manager.py to replace task-completion with completed task, preventing GitHub Actions from falsely flagging it as an OpenAI API key (sk-...)

Infrastructure: Prevented llama-cpp-python from hard-crashing the uvicorn server (ERR_CONNECTION_REFUSED) on older CPUs missing AVX instructions by isolating model loading in a multiprocessing spawn check
Infrastructure: False positive API key detection — Modified docstring in core/interfaces/dashboard/corp_routes.py replacing disk-loaded with loaded from disk to prevent GitHub flag

added: Aethvion Finance: Professional Financial Analyst Dashboard — high-density UI with Bloomberg-style analytics

Agents Tab: Full workspace and thread management system — workspaces map to filesystem directories, each with independent threads

Agents Tab: Collapsible step cards with type-specific icons and foldout detail panels showing file content previews and command output
Agents Tab: Server-side folder browser — inline directory navigator for selecting workspace paths without raw string input
Agents Tab: Full step history persistence — all agent steps saved to thread history and replayed on thread reload

Infrastructure: AgentRunner (agent_runner.py) — autonomous execution engine with write_file, read_file, list_dir, run_command, done tools
Infrastructure: GET /api/agents/browse endpoint — server-side directory browser returning folder entries for a given path
improved: UI: Standardized glassmorphism design language across Finance and Tracking modules
UX: Improved navigation density and status transparency in the core dashboard
Chat: Completely separated from Agents — chat always uses chat_only mode with no agent toggles or active agents column

fixed: Infrastructure: Resolved redundant version definitions across multiple source files
Agents: Gemini 500 INTERNAL error on second agent iteration — caused by full HTML file content accumulating in LLM conversation history

Chat: Misaka Cipher persona expressions ([Emotion: x] [Mood: x]) incorrectly appearing in regular chat responses

gaps that appeared between collapsed file write cards

features.desc: 8-mode editor for mesh, bone, weight, physics, and preview workflows.

features.desc: Custom ZIP-based format containing manifest, full model data, and embedded textures.

features.name: Dynamic Physics

features.name: Live Tracking Mode

features.name: Precision AI Tracking

features.name: Real-time Monitoring
features.desc: Verify tracking alignment with low-latency visual feedback.

features.name: Resource Management

wip.name: Professional Backend Support

modules.name: Aethvion Code IDE
modules.desc: A full AI-powered IDE built on the Monaco editor engine — write, run, and collaborate with AI directly in the browser.

features.name: Monaco Editor
features.desc: VS Code-grade editor with syntax highlighting for 30+ languages, bracket colorization, IntelliSense suggestions, and smooth scrolling.

features.name: AI Copilot
features.desc: Streaming chat, explain, fix, complete, and refactor — all powered by whichever provider or local model is configured.

features.name: File Creation from Chat
features.desc: AI uses ### FILE: markers in its response — files are written to disk and opened in tabs automatically.

features.name: Code Execution
features.desc: Run Python, Node.js, and Bash/Shell scripts directly from the IDE with live-streamed stdout/stderr output.

features.name: Project Context Injection
features.desc: Workspace file structure is automatically included in every AI system prompt so the model always knows what's in the project.

features.name: Persistent Workspace State
features.desc: Open tabs, active file, and recent workspaces are saved to data/code/ and restored on next launch.

features.name: File Tree & Context Menu
features.desc: Recursive file tree with open, rename (inline), delete, new file/folder, and copy path — all from right-click.

features.name: Resizable 3-Panel Layout
features.desc: File tree, Monaco editor, and AI chat panel — all independently resizable with drag handles.

wip.name: Diff View
wip.desc: Side-by-side diff for reviewing AI-suggested changes before applying them.

wip.name: Multi-File Refactor
wip.desc: Coordinate AI changes across multiple open files in a single instruction.

planned.name: Git Integration
planned.desc: Stage, commit, and view diffs without leaving the IDE.

planned.name: Extension System
planned.desc: Plugin architecture for adding language servers, linters, and custom tools.

modules.name: Aethvion Audio
modules.desc: Professional multi-track audio editor with waveform visualization, effects pipeline, and multi-format export.

features.name: Multi-Track Timeline
features.desc: Full multi-track editor with per-track volume, mute, solo, and pan — insert tracks at the playhead position.

features.name: High-Precision Waveform Visualization
features.desc: 2000-point filled gradient waveform rendering with viewport-based ruler accurate at any zoom level.

features.name: Region-Based Editing
features.desc: Click-drag to select regions for trimming, silencing, or targeted effect application.

features.name: Effects Pipeline
features.desc: Fade In/Out, Normalize, Gain (±20 dB), Reverse, Speed control (0.25×–4×), and Crop Silence.

features.name: Format Tools
features.desc: Stereo-to-Mono and Mono-to-Stereo conversion with full resampling support (8kHz–96kHz).

features.name: Undo & Reset
features.desc: Unlimited undo history with one-click reset to the original loaded file.

features.name: Multi-Format Export
features.desc: Export edited audio as WAV (native), MP3, or OGG (FFmpeg required for compressed formats).

wip.name: Virtual Waveform Rendering
wip.desc: Viewport-only canvas rendering for long clips to eliminate blurriness at extreme zoom levels.

planned.name: Spectral View
planned.desc: Frequency-domain visualization for surgical noise removal and EQ editing.

modules.name: Aethvion Drive Info
modules.desc: WinDirStat-style interactive disk space analyzer — scan drives and visualize storage usage.

features.name: Interactive Disk Scanner
features.desc: Recursively scans any path and presents a sortable, drillable tree of files and folders by size.

features.name: .eathscan Archive Format
features.desc: Scan results saved as structured JSON archives with companion .meta sidecars for instant listing without re-parsing.

features.name: Display-Optimized Variants
features.desc: Intelligent tree pruning aggregates small items into placeholders — reduces file size up to 291× for safe browser loading.

features.name: Crash-Safe Large File Streaming
features.desc: FileResponse streaming prevents browser OOM crashes when loading large scans.

wip.name: Treemap Visualization
wip.desc: WinDirStat-style colored block treemap for instant visual identification of large files.

planned.name: Duplicate File Detection
planned.desc: Hash-based scanning to identify and surface duplicate files across scanned paths.

planned.name: Scheduled Scans
planned.desc: Automate recurring scans and diff results to track disk growth over time.
